brief: Graham Platner's Senate campaign implodes amid disarray, OpenAI releases GPT-5.6, and Wally Funk passes away. Research highlights include performance-based incentives in visualization and multimodal sign language recognition.
news_summary: Graham Platner's Maine Senate campaign suspends amid internal chaos; Maine says no official withdrawal yet. OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 model lineup. Wally Funk, who set an age record for space travel, dies at 87. EPA proposes weakening heavy-duty truck pollution rules.
papers_summary: Papers explore performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, and a smart glove for sign language recognition using deep learning. Compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings via a visual analytics system is also presented.

en.brief: Graham Platner's Senate campaign implodes amid disarray, OpenAI releases GPT-5.6, and Wally Funk passes away. Research highlights include performance-based incentives in visualization and multimodal sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: Graham Platner's Maine Senate campaign suspends amid internal chaos; Maine says no official withdrawal yet. OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 model lineup. Wally Funk, who set an age record for space travel, dies at 87. EPA proposes weakening heavy-duty truck pollution rules.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, and a smart glove for sign language recognition using deep learning. Compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings via a visual analytics system is also presented.

zh.brief: 英国工党启动新党魁选举，贝安德成热门人选；中国异见者董广平偷渡韩国成功；广西洪灾预警失效引发质疑；澳门国安法首案起诉颠覆罪。
zh.news_summary: 英国工党议员开始提名新党魁接替施纪贤，贝安德被视为下任首相热门；中国异见者董广平自述偷渡韩国经历；广西洪灾预警系统失灵致民众措手不及；澳门前议员欧锦新被控颠覆国家政权罪。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先中文论文，英文论文涉及可视化、脑机接口、手语识别等AI相关研究。

todays_image.caption: Both the vintage ballot box and the Maine fiasco reflect how the mechanisms of democracy can be bent or broken by the personalities they were meant to contain.
todays_image.title: Ballot box, mid-20th century
